records.question: What movies have the exact title "The Art of War"?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT movie.movie_id FROM movie
WHERE movie.title = 'The Art of War'
records.pred_sql: SELECT movie_id FROM movie WHERE Title = 'The Art of War'

records.question: Which movies were released in 1999 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT movie.movie_id FROM movie
WHERE movie.year <= 1999
records.pred_sql: SELECT movie_id FROM movie WHERE Year <= 1999

records.question: Which movies titled The Whole Nine Yards directed by Jonathan Lynn had a budget of at most 41.3 million and were released in the year 2000 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT movie.movie_id FROM movie
WHERE movie.year <= 2000 AND movie.budget_million <= 41.3 AND movie.director = 'Jonathan Lynn' AND movie.title = 'The Whole Nine Yards'
records.pred_sql: SELECT movie_id FROM movie WHERE Title = 'The Whole Nine Yards' AND Director = 'Jonathan Lynn' AND Budget_million <= 41.3 AND Year <= 2000
